docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JUDE FERRAZ RICARDO
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 21675, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CANTUA WILLIAM D. AS TO DEFENDANT JUDE FERRAZ RICARDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-21-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
